name: Profiling Lightweight Large Language Models

description: arXiv:2607.20806v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Lightweight large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being deployed locally on personal computers and are expected to play a growing role in resource-constrained edge and mobile environments. In such settings, energy consumption, execution time, and memory usage directly affect practical usability, yet existing evaluations of LLM efficiency l...
author: Tomohiro Harada, Enrique Alba, Gabriel Luque
